SEO_TITLE: Andres Villarreal - Full-Stack Developer with 3+ years of experience

ABOUT.tagline: 🔥 I build software, break it, fix it, and make it better.
ABOUT.p1: With {years}+ years of experience building software, I've learned that what matters most is shipping things that actually work in production — not just in demos.
ABOUT.p2: Most of that time has been with .NET, crafting APIs and backend systems, while also working hands-on as an electronic technician — dealing with Linux, hardware, and debugging the unexplainable.
ABOUT.p3: I've done full-stack work, played around with modern frameworks, SQL, and Python — but at the end of the day, I just like building things that work well and make sense.
ABOUT.focus: 🎯 Focused on backend scalability, cloud architecture, and performance.

interestItems: 📚 Reading whenever I get the time

PROJECTS.title: NBD Landscaping
PROJECTS.subtitle: Business app with ASP.NET MVC and C#
PROJECTS.description: A web application designed for a landscaping business, enabling employees to manage clients and projects based on their authentication level. Each employee can create, update, and delete client records, as well as assign projects to specific clients. Users can also add bid records detailing the required materials and labor to calculate the total project cost.

PROJECTS.title: Cities API
PROJECTS.subtitle: ASP.NET Core Web API
PROJECTS.description: A Web API that displays cities corresponding to their respective provinces. Users can also perform CRUD operations on each entity.

PROJECTS.title: Spotify Clone
PROJECTS.subtitle: Built with Astro
PROJECTS.description: A Spotify clone web app where users can play songs and navigate through different types of albums.

PROJECTS.title: Emma's Small Engines
PROJECTS.subtitle: Business app with vanilla HTML5, CSS3 & JavaScript
PROJECTS.description: A web application focused on managing inventory, equipment, repairs, and orders for different types of engines.
